## Severity

- [ ] Low (cosmetic, workaround exists)
- [ ] Medium (feature broken, impacts workflow)
- [ ] High (data loss risk or critical path broken)
- [ ] Critical (platform down or security issue)


## Suggested Tool

- [ ] Copilot (inline fix)
- [ ] Claude Code (multi-file debugging)
- [ ] Codex (well-scoped async fix)
